'''âng-th-m-k''' ('''kangathmekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:worthy|worthy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:worthy|worthy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-th-m-k
|-
! Lemma
| kangathmekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingathmekoko|thingathmekoko]] || [[word:jingathmekoko|jingathmekoko]] || [[word:shingathmekoko|shingathmekoko]] || [[word:kingathmekoko|kingathmekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
